The Impossible Balance
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 39 --

What you must accept and understand is
that in leadership there is no black and
white, no right or wrong
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 39 --

Humans are complicated
Businesses are complicated
Situations are complicated
Shit, life is complicated
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 39 --

You can only do
	your best at any
given time to balance your
demonstration of micromanaging vs.
letting others take complete
ownership
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 39 --

There will be times (lots of them)
when you will lean too far one way or
the other
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 39 --

People will lose their jobs
You will lose customers
You will lose money
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 39 --

All because YOU
held on too tight
or
let go too much.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 39 --

This is something you need to accept
rather than reject and demand
perfection of yourself.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 39 --

Perfect does not exist in these
scenarios because that is subjective
to each person.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 39 --

Many CEOs and leaders are good at
one or the other, but not both.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 39 --

But what you must do in order to
grow as a leader is learn the skill in
the area you lack, for the good of
your team and business
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 39 --

Because in leadership, there ARE
skills that if you so lack and ignore
your lack of competence...they will
ultimately kill your business.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 39 --

This is one of them.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 39 --

Wartime vs Peacetime
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 39 --

Peacetime
●
●
●
●
●
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 39 --

Wartime
●
●
●
●
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 39 --

You must be able to fluctuate
your management style based
on where your company sits
in the market.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 39 --

Peacetime Leader
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 39 --

Peacetime Leader
● Proper protocol leads to winning
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 39 --

Peacetime Leader
● Proper protocol leads to winning
● Focuses on big picture, allows details to be flexible, room for error
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 39 --

Peacetime Leader
● Proper protocol leads to winning
● Focuses on big picture, allows details to be flexible, room for error
● Spends time defining culture
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 39 --

Peacetime Leader
● Proper protocol leads to winning
● Focuses on big picture, allows details to be flexible, room for error
● Spends time defining culture
● Has multiple contingency plans
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 39 --

Peacetime Leader
● Proper protocol leads to winning
● Focuses on big picture, allows details to be flexible, room for error
● Spends time defining culture
● Has multiple contingency plans
● Speaks kindly and always mindful of how it appears to team
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 23 of 39 --

Peacetime Leader
● Proper protocol leads to winning
● Focuses on big picture, allows details to be flexible, room for error
● Spends time defining culture
● Has multiple contingency plans
● Speaks kindly and always mindful of how it appears to team
● Tolerates deviations from the plan
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 39 --

Peacetime Leader
● Proper protocol leads to winning
● Focuses on big picture, allows details to be flexible, room for error
● Spends time defining culture
● Has multiple contingency plans
● Speaks kindly and always mindful of how it appears to team
● Tolerates deviations from the plan
● Minimizes work conflicts
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 39 --

Peacetime Leader
● Proper protocol leads to winning
● Focuses on big picture, allows details to be flexible, room for error
● Spends time defining culture
● Has multiple contingency plans
● Speaks kindly and always mindful of how it appears to team
● Tolerates deviations from the plan
● Minimizes work conflicts
● Sets big exciting goals
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 26 of 39 --

Peacetime Leader
● Proper protocol leads to winning
● Focuses on big picture, allows details to be flexible, room for error
● Spends time defining culture
● Has multiple contingency plans
● Speaks kindly and always mindful of how it appears to team
● Tolerates deviations from the plan
● Minimizes work conflicts
● Sets big exciting goals
● Trains to meet employee satisfaction
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 39 --

Wartime Leader
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 39 --

Wartime Leader
● Violates protocol to win the game for the business
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 29 of 39 --

Wartime Leader
● Violates protocol to win the game for the business
● Focuses on any and all details if they slow down the win
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 30 of 39 --

Wartime Leader
● Violates protocol to win the game for the business
● Focuses on any and all details if they slow down the win
● Instead of defining culture, lets the war define it
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 31 of 39 --

Wartime Leader
● Violates protocol to win the game for the business
● Focuses on any and all details if they slow down the win
● Instead of defining culture, lets the war define it
● Doesn’t sugarcoat shit to the team, they know it’s war time
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 32 of 39 --

Wartime Leader
● Violates protocol to win the game for the business
● Focuses on any and all details if they slow down the win
● Instead of defining culture, lets the war define it
● Doesn’t sugarcoat shit to the team, they know it’s war time
● Intolerant of any slight deviation from the plan
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 33 of 39 --

Wartime Leader
● Violates protocol to win the game for the business
● Focuses on any and all details if they slow down the win
● Instead of defining culture, lets the war define it
● Doesn’t sugarcoat shit to the team, they know it’s war time
● Intolerant of any slight deviation from the plan
● Doesn’t explore or tolerate naysayers
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 34 of 39 --

Wartime Leader
● Violates protocol to win the game for the business
● Focuses on any and all details if they slow down the win
● Instead of defining culture, lets the war define it
● Doesn’t sugarcoat shit to the team, they know it’s war time
● Intolerant of any slight deviation from the plan
● Doesn’t explore or tolerate naysayers
● Trains employees to survive battle
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 35 of 39 --

You need to identify where
your business sits, and what
kind of leader YOU need to be
during that time.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 36 of 39 --

You must learn what the rules
are, and then learn when to
break them.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 37 of 39 --

Most management and
leadership training pertains to
Peacetime management, what
you must understand is when
it’s WARTIME.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 38 of 39 --

#growordie
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 39 of 39 --
